notes: This gate defines the minimum packet authority that must be green before advanced-color, preset, composition, or new-fractal implementation can resume.
Seeding these files does not close the gate; it only makes the required surfaces explicit and machine-readable.

intentional_open_blockers.reason: C2 must add local audit, structural, review, baselines, contracts, doctor, parity, and family-parity command skeletons.
C3 must bind the existing audits and runtime rails into packet outputs under artifacts/salt_ndepend.
C4 must land the first critical family packet for the slider and direct-input regression class.
C6 must teach workflow closure to deny completion when the packet gate is still unsatisfied.
